item.title: How to Look Good Without Any Makeup
item.description: Simple tips on how to look better without makeup.

item.title: How to fix your makeup when it gets messy
item.description: If you feel like your makeup looks messy mid-way, just trust the blending process.

media:content.media:title: How to fix your makeup when it gets messy
media:content.media:description: If you feel like your makeup looks messy mid-way, just trust the blending process.

item.title: Recreating Janhvi Kapoor’s Pre-Wedding Look
item.description: Recreating Janhvi Kapoor’s stunning look from the Ambani pre-wedding bash. Pure royalty and grace.

media:content.media:title: Recreating Janhvi Kapoor’s Pre-Wedding Look
media:content.media:description: Recreating Janhvi Kapoor’s stunning look from the Ambani pre-wedding bash. Pure royalty and grace.

item.title: Anushka Sharma-Inspired Diwali Glow
item.description: Smitha Deepak shares a festive makeup look inspired by Anushka Sharma, perfect for Diwali celebrations.

media:content.media:title: Anushka Sharma-Inspired Diwali Glow
media:content.media:description: Smitha Deepak shares a festive makeup look inspired by Anushka Sharma, perfect for Diwali celebrations.

item.title: How To Apply Smooth Eyeliner on Wrinkled Eyelids
item.description: The wrinkles on our eyelids can make eyeliner more challenging to apply evenly. Want to learn the best tips for applying eyeliner on wrinkled eyelids? Please watch this video for a step-by-step instruction and please don't forget to like/share/subscribe if you enjoy this tutorial. xox Smitha

media:content.media:title: How To Apply Smooth Eyeliner on Wrinkled Eyelids
media:content.media:description: The wrinkles on our eyelids can make eyeliner more challenging to apply evenly. Want to learn the best tips for applying eyeliner on wrinkled eyelids? Please watch this video for a step-by-step instruction and please don't forget to like/share/subscribe if you enjoy this tutorial. xox Smitha
